summary: Roll out Magento admin/cron/frontend DB direct routing, DB baseline tuning, cron scheduler defaults, monitoring asset refresh, and keep ProxySQL in standby mode

changes.description: Rebuild and redeploy base cloud-swarm service images so runtime defaults and config wiring updates are available to current stacks.
Rebuild and redeploy monitoring assets and bootstrap dashboards so updated Metricbeat integrations and observability fixes are rolled out across existing stacks.
Route Magento frontend/admin/cron services to direct writer DB endpoints by setting per-service DB host/port environment values.
Enforce generic cron scheduler baseline controls for faster backlog recovery without codebase-specific job logic.
Scale ProxySQL services to zero replicas so environments run direct DB traffic while retaining the service for future re-enable.
Enforce MariaDB baseline tuning (buffer pool sizing from memory limits, query_cache_size=0, query_cache_type=OFF) and wait for DB services to return healthy tasks.
